patterns.label: Default language preference
patterns.reason: 2 redacted records matched repeated report-language signals.
patterns.recommended_action: Keep generated reports Chinese-first with an English switch where user-facing.

evidence.excerpt: 新生成的 Skill 报告默认使用中文简体，并在右上角提供英文切换。
HTML 报告需要双语能力，但默认内容应该保持中文简体。

patterns.label: Report UI and visualization preference
patterns.reason: 5 redacted records matched repeated artifact-design signals.
patterns.recommended_action: Prioritize white-background Kami-style reports with readable charts and stable navigation.

evidence.excerpt: 新生成的 Skill 报告默认使用中文简体，并在右上角提供英文切换。
HTML 报告需要双语能力，但默认内容应该保持中文简体。
报告排版采用白底 Kami 风格，图表、模块和导航都要清晰。

patterns.label: Approval and privacy boundary
patterns.reason: 2 redacted records matched repeated governance signals.
patterns.recommended_action: Keep adaptive work proposal-only until a reviewer approves an allowlisted patch path.

evidence.excerpt: 自适应升级必须先生成提案，不能直接自动修改源文件。
用户偏好扫描必须由用户提供明确路径，不要默认扫描私人日志。

patterns.label: Delivery format preference
patterns.reason: 2 redacted records matched repeated artifact-format signals.
patterns.recommended_action: Surface stable artifact paths and formats in CLI output and generated summaries.

evidence.excerpt: HTML 报告需要双语能力，但默认内容应该保持中文简体。
用户偏好扫描必须由用户提供明确路径，不要默认扫描私人日志。

patterns.label: Evidence and testing preference
patterns.reason: 2 redacted records matched repeated quality-gate signals.
patterns.recommended_action: Attach focused tests and refreshed evidence reports to every non-trivial skill upgrade.

evidence.excerpt: 每次升级都需要测试、覆盖报告和可审计证据，推送前要跑 CI。
涉及 GitHub 推送时，要保留证据链，避免把计划当作完成证明。
